caption_enhanced: The figure shows the classification of ice-III, ice-V, and ice-VI phases in the liquid-ice-III-ice-V-ice-VI-hydr-sI-hydr-sII phase diagram, with each phase represented by a different color. The percentages of each phase are shown on the y-axis.
key_finding: The most important result is that the hydr-sI and hydr-sII phases are both present in the system, but they are not as stable as the other phases.
